overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a cyberpunk city environment, transitioning from an open plaza with neon fountains through a covered walkway with NPCs and neon signage, ending at a massive stadium covered in holographic advertisements. The scene features dystopian futuristic architecture with prominent green and pink neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic plaza with circular neon fountain

events.description: entering covered walkway from open plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the futuristic plaza toward the covered walkway entrance

entered.detail: circular structure with pink neon lights in the plaza center
tall building with vertical orange and blue stripes
dark overhanging structure marking the walkway entrance

segments.scene_description: The clip opens in a futuristic urban plaza featuring a circular fountain with pink neon lights. The camera moves forward through the open space toward a covered walkway entrance, with tall striped buildings visible in the background under an overcast dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon signage and food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade, passing by NPCs gathered at a food stall

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a red food stall with glowing blue neon light

entered.detail: transparent glass wall with white neon graffiti and symbols
green fluorescent tubes mounted on the ceiling
small red cart with illuminated blue countertop

segments.scene_description: Moving through the covered walkway, the scene is illuminated by green neon ceiling lights and white neon graffiti on the glass railing wall. The camera passes a red food stall where an NPC vendor stands behind a glowing blue counter, with other pedestrians scattered along the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit corridor approaching stairway exit

agents.ego_description: continuing through the corridor toward the stairway, passing sparse pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead in the distance

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading upward to exit

segments.scene_description: The corridor continues with dim lighting and red painted patterns on the concrete floor. The camera moves past the food stall area toward a distant stairway exit, with the covered walkway structure receding into the background and a massive stadium structure becoming visible in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza facing massive stadium with holographic advertisement wall

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open plaza with stadium view
massive neon billboard wall becomes fully visible, illuminating the area with colorful advertisements

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs and emerging into the open plaza to view the massive stadium structure

notable_agents.action: group of people walking toward the stadium entrance

entered.detail: large circular stadium structure with exposed metal framework
curved wall covered in bright multicolored holographic advertisements and signage
large yellow fabric banners hanging from the stadium structure

segments.scene_description: Ascending the concrete stairs, the camera emerges from the covered walkway into a vast open plaza dominated by a massive circular stadium. The stadium features a spectacular curved wall covered in bright holographic advertisements and neon signage, with yellow banners hanging from the structure. The scene transitions from the dim corridor to this brightly lit open area as the camera approaches the stadium entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit urban plaza through a dim covered walkway and into a vast open area dominated by a holographic stadium. It begins by moving past a circular fountain glowing with pink neon lights toward the entrance of a covered corridor under an overcast dusk sky. As the camera enters the walkway, the environment shifts to a tunnel of green ceiling lights and white neon graffiti, passing a red food stall with a glowing blue counter and scattered pedestrians. The scene then progresses through a dimming corridor with red floor patterns before turning toward a distant stairway exit that reveals a massive structure in the distance. Finally, the camera ascends the concrete stairs and emerges from the enclosure into a brightly lit plaza, approaching a colossal circular stadium adorned with yellow banners and vibrant holographic advertisements.
